uses 'both' means of locomotion about equally. B = Both, C = Wheelchair, W = Walk
129 _39LG WLK_WC_GOAL_CD (39Lg) Locomotion - Walk/wheelchair: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient to achieve to walk or use a wheelchair on a level surface at discharge. This item indicates the most frequent mode of locomotion the patient uses - 'walk' or 'wheelchair'. 01 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Total Assistance (Subject less than 25%), 02 = Helper - Complete Dependence/Maximal
